case_title: CLIFFORD LACY et al VS. ANGELA NORMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACY, CLIFFORD LACY, REGINA AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, ANGELA DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, ANGELA
